title: senecio peteroanus
intro: Senecio peteroanus, also known as Peter's ragwort, is a plant species native to the Andes mountain range in South America. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as an infusion or tincture, and can be used to make herbal teas, salves, or ointments for topical application.
